$comment: v0 — the four ledgers and the fork. Morality is read from ledgers, never a karma meter. Negative = dark-leaning.

gods.$comment: Vigor taken vs worship returned, per god, whole game

peoples.$comment: the Last Peoples: outcomes AND causes; engineered decline = massacre

lean.$comment: computed per-player from ledger sums; used for priest dialogue pools, Ur-Noth warmth, epilogue color — never shown as a number

fork.commit: group rite — all present players; dissent triggers the Schism

worldStrength.$comment: shared, server-owned god strength; a consumed remnant dims its god's domain effects WORLD-WIDE, permanently
